fault_hypothesis: The function incorrectly removes the last element from the merged list on line 75 when the last elements of both input lists are identical. This violates the expectation that the merged list should contain all elements from both inputs.

constraints.intent: After popping an element, the total number of elements must still equal the sum of input lengths.
The 'then' branch that handles shared tail values must not reduce the total number of elements.
Before the final return, the merged list must contain all elements from the inputs.
